_publications._publicationTitle: HuR/ELAVL1 drives malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor growth and metastasis.

_contextSnippet: Both constitutively expressed shRNAs reduced HuR levels efficiently, and suppressed cell growth, as shown by measurement of ATP levels and by direct cell counts in all 4 cell lines
details: HuR silencing suppressed cell growth as measured by ATP levels and direct cell counts
